extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity: I excluded all “By” rows, counted the “Against” rows, and kept categories separate. Criminal proceedings against the Company, Directors, Promoters, Key Managerial Personnel and Senior Management are all NIL; statutory/regulatory proceedings against them are also NIL; tax proceedings against the Company are 3, while the 1 tax matter against the Directors is excluded because the note states it pertains personally to promoter/director Ashish Mangal. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company is ₹176.14 lakh, with no quantified subsidiary amount disclosed; this converts to ₹17.614 crore (₹176.14 lakh ÷ 100), excluding promoter/director personal litigation. The contingent-liabilities table is in ₹ lakhs and lists LC and BG amounts but provides no stated Total row, so no contingent-liabilities total is extracted; the latest date shown is March 31, 2025. The company-wide top-10-customer concentration is 49.94% for Fiscal 2025, measured against revenue from operations; the source unit for the litigation and contingent-liability tables is lakh, converted to crore using 100 lakh = 1 crore.
